---
name: contrast-check
description: Test fixture — minimal contrast-check skill
activate_on: accessibility
---

# Contrast Check (fixture)

- Verify text contrast ratio meets 4.5:1 for normal text (WCAG 1.4.3 AA).
- Verify large text contrast ratio meets 3:1 (18pt or 14pt bold).
- Flag insufficient contrast as A11Y-CON-001.
- Report critical when body text fails the 4.5:1 minimum contrast ratio.
